'''''Colicoid Swarm''''' was a modified [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyer]] in the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]]. The vessel was [[Color/Legends|colored]] a bluish grey, with subtle red bow stripes and dark-toned keel, nose, and structure.

==History==
The ''Colicoid Swarm'' was a sister ship to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']], and—along with the [[Lucid Voice/Legends|''Lucid Voice'']]—was used to intimidate the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] into surrendering. With the ''Swarm''{{'s}} grey coloring, the ship was similar enough to the ''Hand'' in spite of its dark hull tones and red bow striping—which was different from the ''Hand''{{'s}} yellow markings. This led victimized [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] into believing that they were being attacked by the ''Invisible Hand''—and therefore Grievous himself.

{{Ship-stub}}
